name: heart pendant
description:
The Eternal Heart Pendant by Zynora Luxe is a modern expression of love and elegance, crafted with two beautifully matched lab-grown diamonds set within a sculptural open-heart silhouette. Featuring a captivating combination of fancy-cut diamonds, this pendant radiates exceptional brilliance while maintaining a refined, contemporary aesthetic.

Handcrafted in 14K Rose Gold, the design blends soft curves with clean lines, creating a piece that feels both timeless and distinctive. Whether gifted for an anniversary, birthday, or worn as an everyday luxury, this pendant is designed to become a cherished symbol of love and connection.

Created with ethically sourced lab-grown diamonds, the Eternal Heart Pendant offers the beauty of fine jewelry with a conscious and modern approach.

Product Details
Collection: Eternal Heart
Metal: 14K Rose Gold
Stone Type: Lab-Grown Diamonds
Design: Open Heart with Fancy Cut Diamonds
Style: Romantic Luxury Pendant
Occasion: Anniversary, Birthday, Wedding Gift, Valentine's Day
Brand: Zynora Luxe
Chain: Sold Separately
Signature Note

name: Cushion Cut Lab Grown Diamond Solitaire Ring
description:
The Celeste – 2.00 CT Cushion Diamond Solitaire Ring

A timeless expression of elegance, The Celeste features a breathtaking 2.00 carat cushion-cut diamond that captures light with exceptional brilliance and fire. Set in a refined solitaire design, this ring is crafted to celebrate love with sophistication and enduring beauty.

Available in 10K, 14K, and 18K Gold, and offered in your choice of Yellow Gold, White Gold, or Rose Gold, each piece is meticulously created to reflect your personal style. The soft, romantic curves of the cushion-cut diamond combined with the graceful band create a ring that feels both modern and timeless.

Whether chosen as an engagement ring or a meaningful gift, The Celeste is designed to become a treasured symbol of life's most unforgettable moments.

Details

• Center Stone: 2.00 CT Cushion-Cut Diamond
• Setting Style: Classic Solitaire
• Metal Options: 10K, 14K & 18K Gold
• Gold Colors: Yellow Gold, White Gold & Rose Gold
• Elegant Four-Prong Setting
• Handcrafted with Exceptional Attention to Detail
• Made by Zynoraluxe

For custom requests, order inquiries, or personalized assistance, please send us a DM. The Zynoraluxe team would be delighted to help you find your perfect jewelry piece.
